definition:
A woman of the tribe of Levi living at the time of Divided Monarchy, first mentioned at 1Ch.26.25; 
 daughter of: Zichri (H2147L)
Another name of she.lo.mot (שְׁלֹמוֹת "Shelomoth" H8013H)
 § Shelomith = "peaceful"
1) a woman of Dan, daughter of Dibri, and mother of a son who blasphemed God and was stoned to death in the time of Moses
2) daughter of Zerubbabel
